heading: Gauging and marking
label: 5368 Gauging and marking
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 5368, , , consisted of provisions similar to those comprising this section, prior to the general revision of this chapter by .act Aug. 16, 1954, ch. 73668A Stat. 666Pub. L. 85–859

children.heading: Gauging and marking
children.label: a Gauging and marking
children.text: All wine or wine spirits shall be locked, sealed, and gauged, and shall be marked, branded, labeled, or otherwise identified, in such manner as the Secretary may by regulations prescribe.

children.heading: Marking
children.label: b Marking
children.text: Wines shall be removed in such containers (including vessels, vehicles, and pipelines) bearing such marks and labels evidencing compliance with this chapter, as the Secretary may by regulations prescribe.
